reviews.comment:
Los trabajadores son lo mejor del lugar
Necesitaba un tornillo y me lo consiguieron al instante sin pedir nada a cambio

The staff are the best thing about this place. I needed a screw and they got it for me instantly without asking for anything in return.

reviews.comment:
El servicio y la higiene del baño me gustó, pero últimamente vengo teniendo problemas con la aplicación del de YPF no , nos deja pagar con QR y no me esta dando el descuento del automóvil club . Espero lo pueda soluciones dado que es un lugar que concurro seguido . Desde ya gracias

(Translated by Google)
I liked the service and the cleanliness of the restroom, but lately I've been having problems with the YPF app; it won't let us pay with QR code and it's not giving me the Automobile Club discount. I hope you can fix this since it's a place I go to frequently. Thank you in advance.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCcTdqVGl3RRAB
